title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB
abstract: The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Board) is adopting a proposal to extend for three years, without revision, the Recordkeeping Guidance Associated with Changes in Foreign Investments Made Pursuant to Regulation K (FR 2064; OMB No. 7100-0109).
action: On March 29, 2024, the Board published a notice in the Federal Register (89 FR 22147) requesting public comment for 60 days on the extension, without revision, of the FR 2064. The comment period for this notice expired on May 28, 2024. The Board did not receive any comments.
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Federal Register > Notice > 2024-16673

The comment period for this notice expired on May 28, 2024. The Board did not receive any comments.
